channel.title: Agent on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Agent on Arrans github.io

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher
item.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

item.title: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
item.description: Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀

item.title: oraios/serena
item.description: A powerful MCP toolkit for coding, providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities - the IDE for your agent

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Source-controlled AI checks, enforceable in CI. Powered by the open-source Continue CLI

item.title: lobehub/lobehub
item.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

item.title: google-labs-code/jules-action
item.description: Add a powerful cloud coding agent to your GitHub workflows

item.title: SWE-agent/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using your LM of choice. It can also be employed for offensive cybersecurity or competitive coding challenges. [NeurIPS 2024]

item.title: BuilderIO/micro-agent
item.description: An AI agent that writes (actually useful) code for you

item.title: 2noise/ChatTTS
item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.title: agentheroes/agentheroes
item.description: Generate, animate and schedule your AI characters 🤖
